name: output-styles
description: Claude Code output styles, represented as unavailable for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Claude Code output styles are not a Codex plugin feature.
interface.longDescription: Output Styles is included in the Codex marketplace for repository parity, but the contained output style files target Claude Code's /output-style feature and are not installable as Codex skills.
defaultPrompt: Install the Claude Code output styles.
